ylH=p((Mk7,i0D)=>{var $=null,A=1,L=Q0D(0,H);this.tempBuff.push(H);while(L>-1){let D=aMH[L],f=D<7;if(f&&D&1)$=D&2?[aMH[++L],aMH[++L]]:[aMH[++L]],A=0;let this._emitCodePoint(H)}["RCDATA_STATE"](H){if(this.preprocessor.dropParsedChunk(),H===p$.AMPERSAND)this.returnState="RCDATA_STATE",this.state="CHARACTER_REFERENCE_STATE";else U0D{constructor(){this.html=null,this.pos=-1,this.lastGapPos=-1,this.lastCharPos=-1,this.gapStack=[],this.skipNextNewLine=!1,this.lastChunkWritten=!1,this.endOfChunkHit=!1,this.bufferWaterline=65536}_err(){}_addGap(){this.gapStack.push(this.lastGapPos),this.lastGapPos=this.pos}_processSurrogate(H){if(this.pos!==this.lastCharPos){let $=this.html.charCodeAt(this.pos+1);if(fEH.isSurrogatePair($))return this.pos++,this._addGap(),fEH.getSurrogatePairCodePoint(H,$)}else if(!this.lastChunkWritten)return this._err(ebA.surrogateInInputStream),H}dropParsedChunk(){if(this.pos>this.bufferWaterline)this.lastCharPos-=this.pos,this.html=this.html.substring(this.pos),this.pos=0,this.lastGapPos=-1,this.gapStack=[]}write(H,$){if(this.html)this.html+=H;else this.html=H;this.lastCharPos=this.html.length-1,this.endOfChunkHit=!1,this.lastChunkWritten=$}insertHtmlAtCurrentPos(H){this.html=this.html.substring(0,this.pos+1)+H+this.html.substring(this.pos+1,this.html.length),this.lastCharPos=this.html.length-1,this.endOfChunkHit=!1}advance(){if(this.pos++,this.pos>this.lastCharPos)return this.endOfChunkHit=!this.lastChunkWritten,iMH.EOF;let H=this.html.charCodeAt(this.pos);if(this.skipNextNewLine&&H===iMH.LINE_FEED)return this.skipNextNewLine=!1,this._addGap(),this.advance();if(H===iMH.CARRIAGE_RETURN)return this.skipNextNewLine=!0,iMH.LINE_FEED;if(this.skipNextNewLine=!1,fEH.isSurrogate(H))H=this._processSurrogate(H);if(!(H>31&&H<127||H===iMH.LINE_FEED||H===iMH.CARRIAGE_RETURN||H>159&&H<64976))this._checkForProblematicCharacters(H);return H}_checkForProblematicCharacters(H){if(fEH.isControlCodePoint(H))this._err(ebA.controlCharacterInInputStream);else ylH=p((Mk7,i0D)=>{var C5{constructor(){this.preprocessor=new oE1,this.tokenQueue=[],this.allowCDATA=!1,this.state="DATA_STATE",this.returnState="",this.charRefCode=-1,this.tempBuff=[],this.lastStartTagName="",this.consumedAfterSnapshot=-1,this.active=!1,this.currentCharacterToken=null,this.currentToken=null,this.currentAttr=null}_err(){}_errOnNextCodePoint(H){this._consume(),this._err(H),this._unconsume()}getNextToken(){while(!this.tokenQueue.length&&this.active){this.consumedAfterSnapshot=0;let H=this._consume();if(!this._ensureHibernation())this[this.state](H)}return this.consumedAfterSnapshot++,this.preprocessor.advance()}_unconsume(){this.consumedAfterSnapshot--,this.preprocessor.retreat()}_reconsumeInState(H){this.state=H,this._unconsume()}_consumeSequenceIfMatch(H,$,A){let
